title: 3D Cactus Flowers
body:
Replaces the Cactus Flowers added in the spring drop with a 3D model
Supports 25w06a+ snapshots and should also work in the full release

![2 block cactus in a desert next to a mesa biome with a cactus flower grown on top with a few placed around it as well.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57d8214ed6f2ecebbb97a2f781f0d3a658a03755.png)
